1.text: Bronchiectasis in both lungs, most prominently in the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Secretions within the bronchiectatic ducts in the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Complete atelectasis of the right middle lobe

4.text: Tree-in-bud appearances in both lungs, especially in the lower lobe of the left lung

5.text: Pleuroparenchymal scarring changes in both lung apices
